title: Result Organisms
description: This is a value set of the SNOMED CT organism concepts for use in the Results section observation values.

bindings.title: Result Organisms (all SNOMED CT)
bindings.note: Searching result organism codes using a complete edition of SNOMED CT.

bindings.title: Result Organisms (IPS Refset)
bindings.ecl: (< 409822003 |Domain Bacteria (organism)| OR < 414561005 |Kingdom Fungi (organism)| OR < 49872002 |Virus (organism)|) AND (^816080008 |International Patient Summary|)
bindings.note: Searching result organism codes using members of the IPS Refset only.
